name: zc-ctx
description: Persistent memory, token optimization, and secure A2A multi-agent coordination for Claude Code. 13 MCP tools: credential-isolated sandbox, hybrid BM25+vector KB, MemGPT working memory, SSRF-protected fetch, KB injection pre-filter, and append-only broadcast channel with scrypt-hardened key. 300 unit tests, 84 security vectors. MIT license.
